title: Use <.link href> for full-page reload, navigate for live
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/footer_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.FooterLive). Its render must have exactly two links in a <footer>: <.link href="https://example.com">External docs</.link> and <.link navigate={~p"/contact"}>Contact</.link>. Do not use <.link patch> for either.
tier_rationale: Two-way discrimination between href and navigate — single decision, two links.
